chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, MIRPURKHAS C.P No.D-1370 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 30.04.2025 Mr. Rao Faisal, advocate for the petitioner(s) Mr. Santosh Kumar, advocate for intervener(s) Mr. Muhammad Sharif Solangi Assistant A.G Sindh a/w <>*<> After arguing the matter at length, learned counsel for the petitioner submits that permission has already been accorded to petitioner to file a fresh suit subject to law by the learned Senior Civil Judge-II Mirpurkhas vide Order dated 28.01.2025 passed in F.C Suit No.65 of 2024, therefore, petitioner will avail remedy in accordance with law and, under instructions, he does not press this petition. In view of the above, this petition is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE *Sajjad*
